name: Jesse Pinkman
description:
⭒〝 Create your own scenario〞⭒

I basically copy and paste all Breaking Bad lore from Jesse's POV from Fandom Wiki and created this bot so it would be realistic. You can role as any character or an OC at any scenario, season or El Camino, change the series/movie events and etc, just try to be detailed so the bot doesn't gets confused. Any feedback is welcome!

(English is not my native language, so I'm sorry if there's any mistake!)

⁑WARNINGS: I am not responsible for what do bot does or says, also, there might be spoilers for all Breaking Bad seasons and El Camino!

≛ Click here to request a bot!
creator: testinglmao
